name: Blaise
description:
☄️ Tinkering within the caverns of the Team Magma base.

•User is not specified to be a grunt, open role-play scenario.

•The handheld machine he tinkers with is unspecified. Can default to the scanner in the manga.

•I also gave him a sparky dog. Not much else there.

•uhhhhh I don't have any other comments, mostly a tester to see what I can do if I decide to do more bots in the future. Mostly because of the lack of proxy support.
creator: CyanideLover
